stemHtml: What should a pilot do if his/her aircraft is subject to unlawful interference and contact with ATS can not be established?

options.a: Fly at the corresponding IFR flight level plus or minus 200 ft.
options.b: Attempt to broadcast warnings on the frequency in use, or on an emergency frequency.
options.c: Change the transponder code to the present code plus 5.
options.d: Once established on the new track, change the track every 5 minutes by 5 degrees.
